tenureTable.name: Mr Nawaz Sharif / PML-N
tenureTable.verdict: Strongest growth, but some external vulnerabilities built up.

tenureTable.name: Imran Khan / PTI
tenureTable.verdict: Volatile cycle: slowdown, COVID hit, rebound, rising stress.

tenureTable.name: Mr Shehbaz Sharif
tenureTable.verdict: Stabilization improved, but debt climbed sharply.
